home.heroTitle2: when you arrive in the morning.
home.heroDesc: NCV Mail reads, analyzes and automatically sorts your emails according to YOUR own rules.
home.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to transform your email management
home.step1Desc: Simple and secure integration with your existing email in just a few clicks.
home.step2Desc: Define your own categories according to your business and specific needs.
home.step3Title: AI manages your inbox on autopilot
home.step3Desc: Our artificial intelligence sorts, prioritizes, prepares replies and extracts your tasks automatically. Your inbox is already managed when you arrive in the morning.
home.trustTitle: Discover why thousands of professionals trust us
home.timeSavingDesc: Save several hours per week by automating email sorting.
home.customizationDesc: Create sorting rules tailored to your business and priorities.
home.dataSecurityDesc: Your data remains confidential and secured with end-to-end encryption.
home.clearVisionDesc: Instantly find your important emails thanks to optimal organization.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to save 2 hours a day?
home.ctaDesc: 100 free emails to discover NCV Mail. No credit card required.

features.heroTitle: Everything you need to take back control of your emails
features.heroDesc: NCV Mail uses artificial intelligence to sort, summarize and reply to your emails automatically.
features.smartSortDesc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your email content and automatically files them in the appropriate folders to keep a clean inbox.
features.autoSummaryDesc: Save precious time by reading a concise AI-generated summary for long threads and endless newsletters.
features.aiDraftsDesc: NCV Mail prepares context-appropriate replies matching your usual tone. All you need to do is review and send.
features.dailyBriefDesc: Receive a clear morning recap of urgent emails, today's meetings and pending follow-ups.
features.taskExtractionDesc: Action items mentioned in your emails are automatically detected and added to your task manager.
features.projectManagementDesc: Intelligently group all exchanges, attachments and participants related to a project in a dedicated space.
features.multiMailboxDesc: Centralize all your accounts (Gmail, Outlook, iCloud, IMAP) in a single, unified and frictionless interface.
features.emailSignatureDesc: Create, manage and deploy dynamic, harmonized professional signatures for yourself or your entire team.
features.smartArchiveDesc: Proactive inbox cleanup: read newsletters and obsolete notifications are archived or deleted according to your rules.
features.priorityDetectionDesc: Never miss what matters. Emails from your important clients or containing urgencies are instantly highlighted.
features.mobileAppDesc: Stay productive on the go with our iOS and Android app optimized for quick and efficient consultation.
features.securityDesc: Your data is protected by end-to-end encryption. We strictly comply with GDPR and never sell your information.
features.ctaTitle: Ready to save 2 hours a day?
features.ctaDesc: 100 free emails to discover NCV Mail. No credit card required.

pricing.heroDesc: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Change or cancel anytime.

classification.heroTitle: 56 industry packs to organize your emails in one click
classification.heroDesc: NCV Mail offers pre-configured category packs for every profession. Lawyer, doctor, restaurateur, e-commerce... Apply yours and let AI sort your emails automatically.
classification.familiesDesc: Each pack contains 6 to 12 categories optimized for your business.
classification.professionalServicesDesc: Lawyers, accountants, notaries, consultants, architects, brokers... Categories adapted to legal, financial and advisory exchanges.
classification.healthDesc: Doctors, dentists, physiotherapists, pharmacists, vets, psychologists. Appointment management, prescriptions, labs and insurance.
classification.commerceDesc: Shops, e-commerce, wholesalers, florists, wine merchants. Orders, suppliers, logistics and daily customer relations.
classification.realEstateDesc: Real estate agencies, building managers, construction companies, property developers. Mandates, visits, sites, quotes and tenders.
classification.businessServicesDesc: Marketing agencies, HR firms, engineering offices, IT companies, chartered accountants. Projects, reporting, invoicing and client collaboration.
classification.craftsDesc: Electricians, plumbers, carpenters, mechanics, landscapers. Quotes, interventions, after-sales and subcontractor management.
classification.educationDesc: Private schools, training centres, coaches, driving schools. Registrations, schedules, certifications and parent/student communication.
classification.hospitalityDesc: Restaurants, hotels, caterers, travel agencies, guesthouses. Reservations, suppliers, events and customer reviews.
classification.otherServicesDesc: Associations, content creators, fashion, transport, cleaning, beauty salons... All businesses that don't fit in a single category.
classification.advantagesTitle: The advantages of NCV Mail classification
classification.advantagesDesc: A system designed so that every email lands in the right place, effortlessly.
classification.operational30sDesc: No need to create your categories one by one. A pre-configured industry pack saves you hours of setup.
classification.operational30sH1: 56 packs for the most common professions
classification.customAIDesc: Your profession isn't in the list? Describe your business and the AI generates a perfectly tailored category pack.
classification.customAIH3: Name and description for each category
classification.mergeNoOverwriteDesc: Applying a pack never erases your existing categories. Duplicates are automatically detected and ignored.
classification.intuitiveSearchDesc: Instantly find the ideal pack with keyword search and collapsible sector families.
classification.howItWorksDesc: From choosing the pack to full automation, in 4 simple steps.
classification.step1Desc: Browse the 9 sector families and find the pack that matches your business.
classification.step2Desc: In one click, the pack's categories are added to your account without overwriting your existing ones.
classification.step3Desc: NCV Mail uses your categories to automatically sort every incoming email into the right folder.
classification.step4Desc: Add, modify or delete categories. Generate a custom AI pack if your profession is unique.
classification.ctaDesc: Choose your industry pack, apply it, and let NCV Mail sort your emails automatically. It's that simple.
classification.ctaFooter: 100 free emails to try • No credit card required

ai.heroTitle: The AI that manages your emails while you work
ai.heroDesc: NCV Mail integrates advanced artificial intelligence that sorts, summarizes, categorizes and prepares your replies automatically. You stay in control, the AI does the repetitive work.
ai.whatAIDoesDesc: Six integrated AI features that transform your daily email management.
ai.autoSortDesc: Every incoming email is analyzed by the AI which identifies its subject, sender and context to automatically sort it into the right category. No more unsorted emails piling up.
ai.smartSummariesDesc: Long threads, endless newsletters and complex exchanges are summarized in a few clear lines. You understand the essentials without reading everything.
ai.aiDraftsDesc: NCV Mail prepares relevant and contextual replies that you only need to review and validate. The AI adapts to your tone and writing style.
ai.dailyBriefDesc: Every morning, receive a smart recap: urgent emails, today's meetings, pending follow-ups and extracted tasks. Start your day with a clear view.
ai.priorityDetectionDesc: The AI automatically identifies urgent emails, important client requests and messages requiring quick action. They are highlighted in your inbox.
ai.aiPacksDesc: Your profession isn't in our 56 pre-configured packs? Simply describe your business and the AI generates a custom category pack perfectly suited to your needs.
ai.howAIWorksDesc: From received email to validated action, in 4 transparent steps.
ai.step1Desc: An email arrives in your NCV Mail inbox.
ai.step2Desc: The AI analyzes the content, sender, subject and context in under 3 seconds.
ai.step3Desc: The email is sorted, summarized, and a reply draft is prepared if necessary.
ai.step4Desc: You find everything organized. One click to validate the AI's suggestions.
ai.securityDesc: We take protecting your data as seriously as our AI's performance.
ai.transparencyDesc: Every AI action is visible and explainable. You see why an email was sorted into a category and can always correct it.
ai.yourDataDesc: No email is used to train models. Your data is processed in real-time and never stored by AI providers.
ai.gdprCompliantDesc: NCV Mail strictly complies with the General Data Protection Regulation. European hosting, encryption and guaranteed right to erasure.
ai.secureInfraDesc: Encryption in transit and at rest. Enhanced authentication. No sensitive data is ever exposed in logs or AI responses.
ai.faq1q: Does the AI really read all my emails?
ai.faq1a: The AI analyzes your email content only to sort and summarize them. No email is stored by the AI provider or used to train models. Processing is ephemeral and real-time.
ai.faq2a: Yes, each AI feature (sorting, summaries, drafts) can be disabled individually from your settings. You always keep full control.
ai.faq3q: Does the AI work in French?
ai.faq3a: Absolutely. NCV Mail is designed for SMEs in Belgium and France. The AI understands and responds in French, Dutch and English.
ai.faq4q: Does the AI make mistakes sometimes?
ai.faq4a: Like any AI, errors are possible. That's why every suggestion is presented for validation. You can correct a sorting in one click and the AI learns from your corrections.
ai.faq5a: NCV Mail uses latest-generation language models, recognized for their reliability and performance in natural language processing. We continuously select and optimize the best available models to ensure quality results.
ai.ctaDesc: Join the SMEs that save 2 hours a day thanks to NCV Mail's artificial intelligence.
ai.ctaFooter: 100 free emails • No credit card required • AI included in all plans

enterprise.heroDesc: NCV Mail combines artificial intelligence and team collaboration for effortless email management. AI sorts, summarizes and prepares your replies while your team collaborates via shared mailboxes, assignments and internal comments.
enterprise.collaborateDesc: Tools designed for SMEs who want to structure their email management without complexity.
enterprise.aiTeam: Artificial intelligence at the team's service
enterprise.aiTeamDesc: NCV Mail's AI works for your entire team: it automatically sorts incoming emails, generates instant summaries, detects priorities and prepares reply drafts. Whether in your personal or shared mailboxes, every email is analyzed and categorized before you even open your inbox.
enterprise.centralOrgDesc: Create your organization in one click and bring your whole team under one roof. Each collaborator has their own access while sharing common resources.
enterprise.rolesPermissionsDesc: Structure your team with clear roles. Administrators manage members and settings, while members focus on their work.
enterprise.sharedMailboxesDesc: Create shared inboxes for your generic addresses (contact@, support@, billing@). Every team member can view, claim and handle incoming emails.
enterprise.internalNotesDesc: Collaborate directly on emails by adding private comments visible only to your team. No more unnecessary forwards and "did you see this email?" on Slack.
enterprise.internalNotesH3: Edit and delete your own notes
enterprise.smartAssignmentDesc: Distribute work efficiently by assigning each email to the right collaborator. The assignee receives a notification and finds their assigned emails in a dedicated view.
enterprise.realTimeNotifsDesc: Never miss anything: every assignment or comment triggers an instant notification. The bell in your sidebar keeps you informed without leaving your inbox.
enterprise.activityDashboardDesc: Track your team's performance at a glance: emails assigned, handled, commented. A chronological activity feed shows you who's doing what, in real-time.
enterprise.workflowDesc: From creating your organization to daily collaboration.
enterprise.wStep1Desc: Name your company and activate the Business plan.
enterprise.wStep2Desc: Send email invitations. They join in one click.
enterprise.wStep3Desc: Create your shared addresses and add the relevant members.
enterprise.wStep4Desc: Assign, comment, track activity. AI handles the rest.
enterprise.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your team's email management?
enterprise.ctaDesc: Join the Belgian and French SMEs that have already adopted NCV Mail for smoother collaboration and tenfold productivity.
enterprise.ctaFooter: Business plan from €49/month • Scalable seats • 2-minute setup
enterprise.faq1q: How many members can I add to my team?
enterprise.faq1a: The Business plan includes base seats, and you can add as many as needed directly from your subscription portal. There is no imposed limit.
enterprise.faq2q: Do my collaborators have access to all my emails?
enterprise.faq2a: No, each member keeps their private emails. Only shared mailbox emails and explicitly assigned emails are visible to the team.
enterprise.faq3q: Are internal comments visible to the email sender?
enterprise.faq3a: Absolutely not. Comments are strictly internal to your organization. The original sender never knows about them.
enterprise.faq4q: Can I upgrade from Solo to Business plan?
enterprise.faq4a: Yes, the upgrade is instant from the Subscription page of your dashboard. Your data and settings are preserved.
enterprise.faq5q: Does AI also work on shared mailboxes?
enterprise.faq5a: Yes, the artificial intelligence sorts, summarizes and categorizes all emails, including those from shared mailboxes, in the same way as for your personal emails.

legal.dataCollectedIntro: As part of using our services, we collect the following data:
legal.dataContent: Email content processed by our AI service
legal.dataUsageIntro: Your personal data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
legal.dataUsageAI: Operation of the AI sorting and analysis service
legal.dataUsageImprovement: Continuous improvement of our service and algorithms
legal.retentionActive: Your data remains active and is retained as long as your account exists on our platform.
legal.retentionDeletion: All your personal data and email content are permanently deleted 30 days after account termination.
legal.gdprRightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
legal.rightAccessDesc: You can request to view the data we hold about you.
legal.rightRectificationDesc: You can request the correction of inaccurate data.
legal.rightErasureDesc: You can demand the deletion of your personal data.
legal.rightPortabilityDesc: You can retrieve your data in a structured and readable format.
legal.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, please contact us at
legal.serviceDescText: NCV Mail is an AI-powered email sorting and management service. The service allows users to connect their existing inboxes to automate the sorting, categorization and prioritization of incoming messages.
legal.accountAccessText1: Access to the service requires creating a user account. When creating this account, the user commits to providing accurate and up-to-date information.
legal.accountAccessText2: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and all activities performed under their account. In case of unauthorized use, the user must immediately notify NCV Management SRL.
legal.userObligationsIntro: The user agrees to use the service in compliance with applicable laws and these terms.
legal.userObl1: Use the service to send spam or unsolicited communications.
legal.userObl2: Transmit illegal, defamatory content, or content infringing third-party rights.
legal.userObl3: Attempt to circumvent security measures or disrupt the service's operation.
legal.liabilityText1: NCV Management SRL strives to keep the service accessible and operational but does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
legal.liabilityText2: To the extent permitted by law, NCV Management SRL disclaims any liability for indirect damages, data loss, or business losses resulting from the use or inability to use the service.
legal.ipText1: All elements making up the NCV Mail service (software, interfaces, algorithms, texts, images) are the exclusive property of NCV Management SRL and are protected by intellectual property laws.
legal.ipText2: The user retains full ownership of data and content (emails) submitted to the service. They grant NCV Management SRL a limited license solely for the purpose of providing the AI sorting service.
legal.terminationText1: The user can terminate their account at any time from the settings of their personal space.
legal.terminationText2: NCV Management SRL reserves the right to suspend or terminate an account in case of violation of these terms of use. Upon termination, user data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
legal.jurisdictionText: These terms of use are governed by Belgian law. In case of dispute regarding the interpretation or execution of these terms, the courts of Brussels shall have sole jurisdiction.

sections.receptionDesc: Your smart inbox. All emails are automatically sorted by priority (urgent, medium, low) and classified by category using AI.
receptionFeatures: Auto-sort by priority with color coding
AI summary of each email in one sentence
Auto sync (every 5 min) with Gmail, Outlook and IMAP
Pagination: batch loading of 50 emails for smooth navigation
Multi-select to archive, delete or mark as read
Assign emails to a colleague (Business plan)
Shared mailboxes tab to view and handle team emails
Email simulator to test AI sorting
New message: compose and send directly
sections.attachmentsDesc: Manage attachments for incoming and outgoing emails. View, download and attach files easily.
attachmentsFeatures: Auto-detection of attachments on reception (Gmail and IMAP)
Visual indicator (paperclip + counter) on emails with attachments
Inline image preview directly in the email
PDFs open in a new tab
Attach files when sending or replying (Attach button)
Up to 10 files per email, 10 MB max per file
Individual removal of attached files before sending
sections.sentDesc: Find all your sent emails and replies. View full conversations with exchange history.
sentFeatures: List of all sent emails and replies
Visual distinction between new messages and replies
Conversation view: full exchange history in one place
Create a follow-up task from a sent email
Access to AI summary of each email
sections.archivesDesc: Find all your archived emails. An archived email no longer appears in Inbox but remains accessible at any time.
archivesFeatures: Unarchive an email to return it to Inbox
Full detail of each archived email
sections.briefDesc: A daily summary of your email activity. View your inbox status and trends at a glance.
sections.tasksDesc: Manage tasks automatically extracted from your emails by AI. Each email with a concrete action generates a task.
tasksFeatures: Auto-generated tasks by AI from your emails
Direct link to source email for each task
Create a follow-up task from a sent email
sections.projectsDesc: Group your emails by project to better organize your work. Create projects and associate emails.
projectsFeatures: Associate an email with a project from Inbox
View all project emails in one click
sections.classificationDesc: Manage your email categories. AI auto-creates relevant categories, but you can customize them. Choose from 50 pre-built industry packs.
classificationFeatures: List of all your categories with counters
50 pre-built industry packs (accounting, real estate, legal, e-commerce...)
AI learns from your corrections to improve
sections.notificationsDesc: Stay informed of important activity. Notifications alert you to urgent emails, assignments and team actions.
notificationsFeatures: Mark a notification as read or mark all as read
sections.settingsDesc: Configure your account, connect your email accounts and customize your preferences.
settingsFeatures: Edit your name, language and email signature
Connect multiple email accounts (Gmail, Outlook, IMAP)
Connect multiple accounts from the same provider
Set custom AI rules (priority/category by sender)
sections.subscriptionDesc: Manage your NCV Mail subscription plan. Compare offers and upgrade.
subscriptionFeatures: View your quota and current consumption
sections.teamDesc: Manage your organization members. Invite colleagues, assign roles and collaborate on emails.
teamFeatures: Roles: admin (full management) and member (limited access)
Remove a member from the organization
Create your organization if it doesn't exist yet
sections.sharedMailboxesDesc: Share email accounts with your team. Admin shares an existing email connection, members can view and handle emails.
sharedMailboxesFeatures: Admin shares one of their email connections as a shared mailbox
Add or remove members from a shared mailbox
Members see shared emails in Inbox > Shared mailboxes tab
Claim an email to indicate you're handling it
sections.teamActivityDesc: Track your team's activity in real time. See who's doing what and follow important actions.
teamActivityFeatures: View each member's actions (emails read, archived, assigned...)
Filter by member or action type

agenda.noDetected: No appointments detected in your recent emails
